ggsegKong 1.0.1
  • Reference

Kong 2019 MS-HBM 17-Network Atlas

Source: R/kong2019.R
kong2019.Rd

Brain atlas for the Kong et al. (2019) Multi-Session Hierarchical Bayesian Model 17-network cortical parcellation. Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

kong2019()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Kong R, et al. (2019). "Spatial Topography of Individual-Specific Cortical Networks Predicts Human Cognition, Personality, and Emotion." Cerebral Cortex, 29(6):2533-2551. doi:10.1093/cercor/bhy123

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: kong2022_100()

Other cortical_atlases: kong2022_100()

Examples

kong2019()
#> 
#> ── kong2019 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 16
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 32 × 3
#>    hemi  region label           
#>    <chr> <chr>  <chr>           
#>  1 left  2      lh_17Networks_2 
#>  2 left  3      lh_17Networks_3 
#>  3 left  4      lh_17Networks_4 
#>  4 left  5      lh_17Networks_5 
#>  5 left  6      lh_17Networks_6 
#>  6 left  7      lh_17Networks_7 
#>  7 left  8      lh_17Networks_8 
#>  8 left  9      lh_17Networks_9 
#>  9 left  10     lh_17Networks_10
#> 10 left  11     lh_17Networks_11
#> 11 left  12     lh_17Networks_12
#> 12 left  13     lh_17Networks_13
#> 13 left  14     lh_17Networks_14
#> 14 left  15     lh_17Networks_15
#> 15 left  16     lh_17Networks_16
#> 16 left  17     lh_17Networks_17
#> 17 right 2      rh_17Networks_2 
#> 18 right 3      rh_17Networks_3 
#> 19 right 4      rh_17Networks_4 
#> 20 right 5      rh_17Networks_5 
#> 21 right 6      rh_17Networks_6 
#> 22 right 7      rh_17Networks_7 
#> 23 right 8      rh_17Networks_8 
#> 24 right 9      rh_17Networks_9 
#> 25 right 10     rh_17Networks_10
#> 26 right 11     rh_17Networks_11
#> 27 right 12     rh_17Networks_12
#> 28 right 13     rh_17Networks_13
#> 29 right 14     rh_17Networks_14
#> 30 right 15     rh_17Networks_15
#> 31 right 16     rh_17Networks_16
#> 32 right 17     rh_17Networks_17
if (FALSE) plot(kong2019()) # \dontrun{}
